channel.title: SPL - Broadview Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Broadview Branch

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Teen Tutoring
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Weekly Homework Help sessions, just for teens! Reserved for students in grades 9-12.  

Event details

item.title: Fit & Fall Proof
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Broadview Branch

Older adults, join this ongoing class to maintain an independent, freely-functioning lifestyle!

Event details

item.title: Monthly Movie: "Omar"
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a presentation, screening, and discussion of "Omar".

Event details

item.title: Teen Writing Series: FIRE
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

9th-12th graders! Join us for our new teen writing workshop series: The FIRE (The Fearless Ideas wRiting Experience).

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Broadview Branch

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

Event details

item.title: Game on! Board Games for All Ages
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Calling all board gamers. Join us and play a game or two.

Event details

item.title: Broadview Bands: Dennis Rea
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Broadview Branch

Guitar Ambassador Dennis Rea Takes You on a Musical Travelogue!

Event details

item.title: Fit & Fall Proof

item.title: Artist Playground
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Broadview Branch

Kids aged 5-11! Get your artistic energy out at this open play art space! 

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year.

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

item.title: FamilyWorks Mobile Food Bank

Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Broadview Branch

Come by the Mobile Pantry to receive free nutritious food!
